title: Horizon Map III: Undecidability, Gödel & Phase Transition Shadows

busy_beaver_approx.description: BB(n) known for n≤6: exp-growth (EML-1 shadow for small n)
busy_beaver_approx.note: BB(5)=47176870, BB(6)>10^{15000}: EML-1 for known values

kolmogorov_complexity.description: K(x): approximated by compression; E[K(X)] = H(X) = EML-2
kolmogorov_complexity.note: K(x) ≤ |x| + c: upper bound EML-2; exact = EML-∞

oracle_hierarchy.description: 0' (first jump) = EML-2 (log structure of Turing jumps per S199)

rice_computable.description: Decidable properties of programs: EML-2 (index sets)
rice_computable.note: Rice: non-trivial semantic = EML-∞; syntactic = EML-0/2

provability_logic.note: Provability predicate Bew = EML-2 (definable in PA)

herbrand_disjunctions.description: Herbrand theorem: if provable, has finite witness = EML-2

truth_definition.description: Tarski truth predicate = EML-∞ (undefinable in own language)

large_cardinal_shadow.description: Consistency of ZFC + large cardinals: still EML-∞
large_cardinal_shadow.note: Each consistency strength step = Δd=1 (Turing jump analog)

godel.shadow_measure: Probability over provable sentences (uniform measure on proofs)
godel.note: Gödel: shadow = EML-2 (provability logic); truth = EML-∞

below_Tc_order_param.description: m ~ (T_c-T)^β: power law order parameter = EML-2

above_Tc_susceptibility.note: Divergent but EML-2 form: shadow accessible above transition

correlation_length.description: ξ ~ |T-T_c|^{-ν}: diverges as power law = EML-2

phase_transition.note: Phase transition: shadow = EML-2 (critical exponents = power laws)

undecidability_shadows.pattern: All three = EML-2 primary shadow; all involve probabilistic/power-law measures
undecidability_shadows.key_insight: Undecidability shadow = EML-2; phase transitions shadow = EML-2 (critical exponents)

key_theorem: The EML Undecidability Shadow Theorem (S228, Direction C): The accessible shadows of undecidability and incompleteness are EML-2: Halting: Kolmogorov complexity E[K] = H = EML-2; Turing jump 0''= EML-2. Gödel: provability logic Bew = EML-2 (definable in PA). Phase transitions: critical exponents (power laws) = EML-2. All three EML-∞ objects have EML-2 accessible shadows. Shadow measure in each case: a probability measure over the 'accessible' part (programs, provable sentences, configurations below/above T_c).
rabbit_hole_log: Gödel shadow = EML-2: provability logic Bew is definable in PA — the accessible part
Phase transition shadows = EML-2: critical exponents are EML-2 power laws
All undecidability shadows = EML-2: probability over accessible programs/proofs
